<!--
Thanks for the PR! Please complete the checklist below.
If your change is small (typo, doc tweak), feel free to delete the
sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `node tools/check-zero-deps.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] If the public API changed, `types/index.d.ts` is updated
- [ ] README.md and README.es.md updated if user-visible
- [ ] No new runtime, peer, or dev dependencies were added
- [ ] No real Siigo credentials or production data in the diff

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky? Alternatives you considered? Known limitations? -->
